entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Kontratua: esaldi bakarrean gogorarazi galdera bat egingo duzula aldi bakoitzean, eta pista bat, birformulazioa, adibidea, erronka, sintesia edo erantzuna agertzea eska dezakedala.
Kontratuek xarmak baino gehiago axola dute

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Kontrastatu okerreko eredu tentagarria eta zuzena.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
Could not save date of birth
Court culture is near its high point
entries.value: Gorteko kultura bere gailurretik gertu dago

entries.source: Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Gorteko itzulpena eta eztabaida esanguratsuak izan ziren

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: gortea, batzarra, jauregia, aginte-denda edo administrazio-zentroa

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Sortu partekatutako ataza-taula bat, eskatu nire lehen ekarpena, eta lan egin nire ondoan kontrol-puntuekin.

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Eztabaidatu babes-neurriak, sozialdemokrazia eta konstituzio-konpromisoaren kostua.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Laburpen-araua: ikasleak amaitzeko edo laburpena egiteko eskatzen duenean, laburbildu aurkikuntzak, ebidentziaren ziurtasuna eta geratzen diren zalantzak, eta eman pasaporteko zigilu bat.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Araztea ez da asmatzea. Hipotesi bat osatzen duzu, huts egiten duen biderik txikiena aztertzen duzu, eta gero aldagai bakarra aldatzen duzu aldi bakoitzean.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Zehaztu sortzen ari garena eta bete behar duen estandarra.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Ezabatu fetch-a eta jarri erantzuna zuzenean kodean.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi gune nagusia izan zen 1857ko matxinadan

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Eskaria eskuinera mugitzen da kafea garestiagoa delako.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Garatu aukerarik sendoena probatu daitekeen zerbait bihurtu arte.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Diagnostikatu industria bat 5 esalditan: identifikatu bi indarrik sendoenak, azaldu zergatik, eta epaitu irabaziak babestuta diruditen.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Zailtasuna igo edo leundu egiten da zure erantzunaren arabera.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Ez erabili hau txatbot generiko gisa edo pertsona ospetsu baten mozorro gisa.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Dokumentatua, berreraikitze sinesgarria, parafrasi modernoa, eztabaidatua edo fikzionalizatua.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Krisi, erbeste, epaiketa edo espetxeratze garaian

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Amaitu sprint bakoitza artefaktu edo erabaki batekin.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Amaitu saio hau laburpen-artefaktu batekin: pertsonak zer defendatu duen, nik zer zalantzan jarri dudan, ikuspegirik sendoena, baieztapenik ahulena, ikasitako testuinguru historikoa, galdera irekiak, gomendatutako hurrengo topaketak, eta gordetako aipu guztiak argi markatuta sortutako parafrasi gisa, iturririk ez badute.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Aroa, mundu-ikuskera publikoa, ahotsa eta erregistroek sostenga dezaketena.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Ebaluatu ondarea testuingurua aitzakia edo gaitzespen huts bihurtu gabe.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Pertsonak jada bizi izan dituen gertaerak.

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter
Exact timing of every alley evacuation
Exact words spoken by ordinary people
Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Hori da. Konparazio errazak eta aldatzeko aukerak bezeroei plataformen aurrean indarra ematen diete.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Azaldu arazketa-plan bat: adierazi sintoma, zure lehen hipotesia, probarik txikiena eta emaitza bakoitzak zer esan nahiko lukeen.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Azaldu merkatu-aldaketa bat: esan zein kurba mugitzen den, zergatik mugitzen den, eta zer gertatzen den prezioarekin eta kantitatearekin.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Azaldu ideia zure hitzekin, eman adibide bat, eman kontraadibide bat, eta aplikatu kasu berri bati.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Agerrarazi falta den inputa, arriskua, denbora-presioa edo esparru argigabea.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri zentro inperiala izan zen

entries.source: Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Sua haizearekin eta eraikin trinkoekin zabaltzen da

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Ikusgai dagoen errore-mezua konpontzea, hura sortu duen egoeraren arrastoa jarraitu gabe.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Markatu testuinguru garrantzitsua erantzun bakoitza gehiegi bete gabe.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Jarraitu galdera historiko bati pertsonen, objektuen eta boterearen bidez.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Jarraitu egun arrunt edo erabakigarri bati, giroa, presioa eta aukerak kontuan hartuta.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Janari-banaketan lehia bizia, bezero indartsuak eta erraz aldatzeko aukera egon daitezke; horrek irabazia estutzen du, eskaria handia denean ere.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Janari-prezioak, zurrumurruak, errege-politika eta jendetza armatuak Paris haustura erabakigarri baterantz bultzatzen ari dira.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Merkatari atzerritarrak espazio arautuetan biltzen dira

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Atzerritar izatea erabilgarria izan daiteke, eta zaindua

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Zatikiak, eskaintza eta eskaria, Newtonen legeak...

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: muga, merkataritza-bidea, mugaldea, ontzia, monasterioa edo goarnizioa

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Sortutako elkarrizketa simulazioa da, ez egiaztatutako aipua.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Eman gai bat edo itsatsi oharrak. 12 txartel fokatu sortuko ditut, nahi izanez gero pistak, tranpak eta adibideak gehituta.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Eman adibide paralelo bat pentsatzen laguntzeko, nire helburua konpondu gabe. Amaitu galdera batekin.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Ongi. Denborak probatu dituzu datu-eredua berridatzi aurretik.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Taldekatu antzeko ideiak eta eman izena ereduari.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Gidariak itzultzen du, baina bertakoek zalantza nabaritzen dute.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Utzi hurrengo mugimendua nire esku. Eman ataza argi bat eta itxaron nire ekarpena zure berrikuspena egin aurretik.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Modu zailagoa: erantzun ondoren, gehitu kontraadibide bat edo ideia non ez den funtzionatzen erakusten duen muga bat.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
Help me understand supply and demand
Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Prezio handiagoak ez du esan nahi eskaria handitu denik. Zerga eskaintzaren aldean hasten da, saltzaileen kostuak aldatuz.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Sare arruntei lotutako bizilagun historikoki sinesgarria

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Zaldi-izerdia, intsentsua, laka, kobrezko txanponak eta hizkuntzak elkarri lotuta merkatu arautu batean.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Alkaterna beroa, izututako oin-hotsak, kanpaiak, kea eta zurezko habeak kraskatzea, estuegi eraikitako hiri batean.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Lekuko jakin batek Sokratesi buruz nola sentitu zen

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Nola ikusia izan nahi duzu iristen zarenean?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
entries.value: Zein zorrotza izan behar du pasabideak?

entries.source: How strong are you right now?

entries.value: Zein ikusgarri agertu behar du ebidentziak?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Azalpen zuzena eskatzen ari naiz. Eman azalpen labur bat, eta gero eskatu zuzendutako ideia nire hitzekin berriz azaltzeko.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Azalpena laburtu dezaket, baina hurrengo urratsa desblokeatu aurretik ulermen-froga bat behar dut oraindik.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Ezin izan dut orain erantzun. Saiatu berriro, mesedez.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Ezin izan dut txartel-sorta hori orain sortu. Saiatu gai laburrago batekin edo ohar sinpleagoekin.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Ezin izan dut galdetegi hori orain sortu. Saiatu gai sinpleago batekin edo saiatu berriro.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Ezin izan dut txartel-berrikuspen hori gorde. Saiatu berriro, mesedez.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Ezin izan dut erantzun hori puntuatu. Saiatu berriro, mesedez.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Ikasgaia aktibo mantenduko dut: pista eman, konpondu, moteldu edo erronka handitu, zuk eskatzen duzunean.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Prest banago, eskatu ideia nire hitzekin azaltzeko. Bestela, egin azken sintesirako behar den galdera bakarra.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Prezioa igotzen bada eta bolumena egonkor mantentzen bada, diru-sarrerak handitu daitezke. Kostuak azkarrago igotzen badira, kutxa-fluxu librea hala ere jaitsi daiteke.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Ekoizpen-kostuak igotzen badira, saltzaileek prezio handiagoa behar dute kantitate bera eskaintzeko; beraz, eskaintza-kurba ezkerrera mugitzen da.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Kontzeptu bat ulertzen baduzu, adibide bat eta kontraadibide bat eman ditzakezu, eta kasu txiki ezezagun bat ebatzi.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Esklabotza, askatutakoen estatusa eta babes-harremanak baztertzeak zure suposizioak nabarmen moderno bihurtuko lituzke.
